description: Composition Navy blue shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, full buttoned placket, a vented hem and graphic print just above the hem Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Flat dry in shade Enjoy those mind-calming sessions of yoga in style and comfort in this urban yoga shirt. Made of pure, sweat absorbent cotton, this shirt is stitched with flat seams and a printed label to prevent irritation, allowing you to concentrate on your yoga activity. Reinforced tear points give strength, while the grippy fabric ensures it doesn't slip and cause discomfort when you exercise. The stretchable, soft fabric and split hem is all that you need to feel at ease during those exercise sessions. Model statistics The product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
